---
title: "[Reproducible Research]{.clr-white .r-fit-text}"
subtitle: "[Dr. Ajay Kumar Koli $\\cdot$ 2nd SARA Bootcamp]{.clr-white .r-fit-text}"
#author: "[SARA Institute of Data Science, Sonipat, Haryana, India]{.clr-white .r-fit-text}"
logo: images/logo-sara.png
page-title: "Bootcamp"
format: revealjs
progress: true
controls: true
slide-number: true
scrollable: true
menu: true
incremental: true
theme: style.scss
bibliography: references.bib
lightbox: true
transition: slide
filters:
  - roughnotation
title-slide-attributes: 
  data-background-image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1621947081720-86970823b77a?q=80&w=1932&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&ixid=M3wxMjA3fDB8MHxwaG90by1wYWdlfHx8fGVufDB8fHx8fA%3D%3D"
  data-background-size: "cover"
  data-background-color: "black"
  data-background-opacity: "0.5"
---

## {background-image="https://media0.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExNjJrc3ozM2c2NXJpZ3U0NGFtYzFzeTgzOWc1bDY4azF5N2Z4cGpicyZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/ZWhA850E7azfO/giphy.gif" background-size=50% background-color=black}

# [Our Common<br>Research Frustrations]{.r-fit-text} {background-color=silver}

::: {layout-nrow="1"}
![](images/excel.jpg)

![](images/word.jpg)

![](images/ppt.jpg)
:::

::: footer
Image source: [R. Azad at Unsplash](https://unsplash.com/@rubaitulazad)
:::

## Repetitive Data Cleaning

<br>

::: {layout-nrow="1"}
![](images/excel.jpg)

![](images/word.jpg)

![](images/ppt.jpg)
:::

- Spending hours **manually cleaning** survey data in Excel

- Making the **same corrections** across multiple data sets

- Risk of human error in **copy-paste** operations

## Version Control Nightmares

<br>

::: {layout-nrow="1"}
![](images/excel.jpg)

![](images/word.jpg)

![](images/ppt.jpg)
:::

- **Files named:** "Analysis_final.xlsx", "Analysis_final2.xlsx", "Analysis_FINAL_FINAL.xlsx"

- **Forgetting** what changes you made between versions

- Collaborators **overwriting** each other's work

## Lack of Reproducibility

<br>

::: {layout-nrow="1"}
![](images/excel.jpg)

![](images/word.jpg)

![](images/ppt.jpg)
:::

- How did I generate this graph **six months ago**?

- Can't **replicate** your own analysis for revisions

- Reviewers asking for different analysis - **starting from sratch**

## Limited Visualization Options

<br>

::: {layout-nrow="1"}
![](images/excel.jpg)

![](images/word.jpg)

![](images/ppt.jpg)
:::

- Stuck with basic **Excel** charts

- Spending hours formating graphs **manually**

- Can't create **interactive or dynamic** visualizations

## Time-Consuming Report Writing

<br>

::: {layout-nrow="1"}
![](images/excel.jpg)

![](images/word.jpg)

![](images/ppt.jpg)
:::

- **Copy-pasting results** into Word/PPT documents

- Updating 50 tables when **data changes**

- Inconsistent **formatting** across documents

## [The Magic of Quarto]{.r-fit-text .clr-white .theme-cursive} {background-color="black"}

![](https://cdn.myportfolio.com/45214904-6a61-4e23-98d6-b140f8654a40/7ebda7dd-2f29-44a5-b625-0e5de613c9a2.png?h=fdba5cb561f19f728a97f882b5d887c0){fig-align="center"}

::: footer
Artwork source: [Allison Horst](https://allisonhorst.com/allison-horst)
:::

# Automated,<br>Reproducible Research with Quarto {background-image="https://cdn.myportfolio.com/45214904-6a61-4e23-98d6-b140f8654a40/b2f0e2ac-40b2-42bf-b854-ec700b4086f3.png?h=b3a4f2136ea8e31650e6fe317adae875" background-size="25%" background-position="70% 90%" background-color=silver}

::: footer
Artwork source: [Allison Horst](https://allisonhorst.com/allison-horst)
:::

## Reproducible Research

<br>

> "Reproducible research is when someone else (or your future self) can take your data and code, run it, and arrive at the same results you reported."

::: footer
AI generated information
:::

## Why Should Researchers Aim for It?

1. 🔍 **It builds trust:** [If others can verify your work, your findings carry more weight. Science runs on trust — reproducibility is how you earn it.]{.rn-fragment rn-color=orange}

1. 🐛 **It catches mistakes:** [When you document every step, errors are easier to spot — by you or by reviewers. Many high-profile retractions could have been avoided with reproducible practices.]{.rn-fragment rn-color=lightgreen}

1. 🕐 **It saves your future self:** [Come back to a project after 6 months and you'll thank yourself for writing everything down. Undocumented analysis is a nightmare to revisit.]{.rn-fragment rn-color=skyblue}

1. 🤝 **It enables collaboration:** [Teammates and collaborators can pick up exactly where you left off — no guessing, no "it works on my machine" problems.]{.rn-fragment rn-color=lavender}

1. 🌍 **It advances science faster:** [When research is reproducible, others can build on it confidently instead of wasting time redoing or questioning your work.]{.rn-fragment rn-color=tomato}

1. 📋 **It's increasingly required:** [Journals, funding bodies, and institutions are now requiring reproducibility as a standard. Getting ahead of it is a career advantage.]{.rn-fragment}

::: footer
AI generated information
:::

## The Problem:

- We run analysis in **SPSS**, create charts in **Excel**, [copy-paste]{.rn-fragment rn-type=crossed-off rn-color=red} everything to **Word**

- Your boss asks for **changes** - you **redo everything** [manually]{.rn-fragment rn-type=crossed-off rn-color=red}

## Quarto Solutions {background-image="https://cdn.myportfolio.com/45214904-6a61-4e23-98d6-b140f8654a40/2b931008-dc7c-4bec-92cb-112a55126975.png?h=871b1aae03178c6070513da1c32ad80c" background-size="50%" background-position="50% 90%"}

- [Your research **narrative** (written text)]{.rn-fragment rn-type=box rn-color=red fragment-index=1}

- [Live Code that runs **analysis**]{.rn-fragment rn-type=box rn-color=blue}

- [Automatically generated **tables and figures**]{.rn-fragment rn-type=box rn-color=orange}

- [Citations and **references**]{.rn-fragment rn-type=box rn-color=seagreen}

::: footer
Artwork source: [Allison Horst](https://allisonhorst.com/allison-horst)
:::

## Quarto Produces: {background-image="https://cdn.myportfolio.com/45214904-6a61-4e23-98d6-b140f8654a40/6f28e7d4-3394-43f9-8b0d-41c52de3883f.png?h=5d4266045860148112f98fc5abb30dac" background-size="60%" background-position="center 70%"}

> Articles & Reports ~ Presentations ~ Websites ~ Books & [more](https://quarto.org/docs/gallery/#interactive-docs)

::: footer
Artwork source: [Allison Horst](https://allisonhorst.com/allison-horst)
:::

## The Learning Curve {background-image="https://cdn.myportfolio.com/45214904-6a61-4e23-98d6-b140f8654a40/decd5894-be6d-4ec4-8396-f5be0b09aa48.png?h=fd9e6d4af36177f99cf991fc946501cb" background-size="50%" background-position="right"}

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}
- R for Data Science 2e ([free ebook](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/))

- Quarto [guide](https://quarto.org/docs/guide/) includes documentation and tutorials

- YouTube Channels: [@RProgramming101](https://www.youtube.com/@RProgramming101), [@rappa753](https://www.youtube.com/@rappa753)

- Posit (formerly RStudio) [blog](https://posit.co/blog/)
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

:::

::::


::: footer
Artwork source: [Allison Horst](https://allisonhorst.com/allison-horst)
:::


## Common Fears, Overcoming Barriers

<br>

> 🫠 *"I'm not good at math/technical things"*

::: fragment

- Coding is more about **logical thinking** than math   

- You already do logical thinking in **research design**   

- Many successful coders **struggled** with math   

:::

## Common Fears, Overcoming Barriers

<br>

> 🏃🏽‍♂️ *"I don't have time to learn"*

::: fragment

- Initial **investment** pays dividends

- Even **30 minutes** daily for a month makes a difference

- The time you **save later** is worth it

:::

## Common Fears, Overcoming Barriers

<br>

> 😬 *"What if I get stuck?"*

::: fragment

- Massive **online community** ready to help

- Error messages are normal—even **experts Google** them

- AI assistants (like **ChatGPT**) can help with code

:::

## Common Fears, Overcoming Barriers

<br>

> 🥱 *"My field doesn't really need this"*

::: fragment

- Every field is generating **more data**

- **Funders** increasingly expect computational methods[^1]

- Sets you apart in **job market**   

:::

[^1]: Computational Social Science related programs, [CSSSA](https://computationalsocialscience.org/education-for-css/)
